name: Perplexity
description: AI-powered answer engine that provides accurate, trusted, and real-time answers to any question. Supports chat completions, agent responses, web search, and embeddings.

endpoints.label: Create Response Agent
endpoints.description: Create a response using the Agent API with third-party models, presets, and tools

endpoints.label: Message a Model Chat
endpoints.description: Create one or more completions for a given text

endpoints.label: Create Embedding Embedding
endpoints.description: Generate vector embeddings for text input

endpoints.label: Create Contextualized Embedding Embedding
endpoints.description: Generate context-aware embeddings for document chunks

endpoints.label: Search Search
endpoints.description: Get raw, ranked web search results with filtering and content extraction
